display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as parsedmarc.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official dedicated parsedmarc documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official documentation site links to the domainaware/parsedmarc GitHub source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies DMARC report analysis and visualization; source_facts.executables identifies CLI.
